title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions
text: insidertrade provides access SEC insider trading data (Forms 3/4/5) two sources: Insider transactions bulk data sets (quarterly TSV downloads) EDGAR API (company filing metadata Form 4 XML transaction details)

title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions
text: can install development version GitHub :

title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions
text: SEC requires valid User-Agent contact information API requests. Set per session making calls: Optionally, enable caching avoid re-downloading data:

title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions
text: Download parse Form 3/4/5 tables 2025:

title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions
text: Filter open-market purchases (code "P") officers directors — informative signal insider sentiment:
code: buys <- trans[   trans_code == "P" &     grepl("Officer|Director", rptowner_relationship) &     trans_date >= "2025-01-01" & trans_date <= "2025-12-31" ] buys[, let(value = trans_shares * trans_pricepershare)]

title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions
text: Rank companies number distinct insider buyers:
code: top <- buys[,   .(n_insiders = uniqueN(rptownercik), total_usd = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE)),   by = .(ticker = issuertradingsymbol, company = issuername) ] setorder(top, -n_insiders, -total_usd) head(top, 10) #>     ticker                           company n_insiders  total_usd #>     <char>                            <char>      <int>      <num> #>  1:   ACTU        ACTUATE THERAPEUTICS, INC.         24   11999904 #>  2:   EFSI      EAGLE FINANCIAL SERVICES INC         21     596869 #>  3:   ALKT           ALKAMI TECHNOLOGY, INC.         19  534703590 #>  4:    CBC          Central Bancompany, Inc.         17    5104827 #>  5:   MTDR              Matador Resources Co         17    4647941 #>  6:   KYMR         Kymera Therapeutics, Inc.         16 1347604988 #>  7:   AVBH           Avidbank Holdings, Inc.         16    3488755 #>  8:   WSBC                      WESBANCO INC         15    1556841 #>  9:    VAC MARRIOTT VACATIONS WORLDWIDE Corp         14  222259811 #> 10:    HPP   Hudson Pacific Properties, Inc.         14    2564984

title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions
text: Identify stocks 3 insiders bought within year — strong bullish signal:
code: cluster <- buys[,   .(     n_insiders = uniqueN(rptownercik),     total_usd = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE),     first_buy = min(trans_date),     last_buy = max(trans_date)   ),   by = .(ticker = issuertradingsymbol, company = issuername) ][n_insiders >= 3L] setorder(cluster, -n_insiders, -total_usd) head(cluster, 10) #>     ticker                           company n_insiders  total_usd  first_buy #>     <char>                            <char>      <int>      <num>     <Date> #>  1:   ACTU        ACTUATE THERAPEUTICS, INC.         24   11999904 2025-06-27 #>  2:   EFSI      EAGLE FINANCIAL SERVICES INC         21     596869 2025-02-07 #>  3:   ALKT           ALKAMI TECHNOLOGY, INC.         19  534703590 2025-05-15 #>  4:    CBC          Central Bancompany, Inc.         17    5104827 2025-11-21 #>  5:   MTDR              Matador Resources Co         17    4647941 2025-02-21 #>  6:   KYMR         Kymera Therapeutics, Inc.         16 1347604988 2025-06-30 #>  7:   AVBH           Avidbank Holdings, Inc.         16    3488755 2025-08-07 #>  8:   WSBC                      WESBANCO INC         15    1556841 2025-05-22 #>  9:    VAC MARRIOTT VACATIONS WORLDWIDE Corp         14  222259811 2025-03-04 #> 10:    HPP   Hudson Pacific Properties, Inc.         14    2564984 2025-06-12 #>       last_buy #>         <Date> #>  1: 2025-06-27 #>  2: 2025-07-31 #>  3: 2025-08-13 #>  4: 2025-11-21 #>  5: 2025-11-06 #>  6: 2025-12-11 #>  7: 2025-08-08 #>  8: 2025-10-30 #>  9: 2025-11-25 #> 10: 2025-06-12

title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions
text: Compute market-wide buy/sell ratio month — classic contrarian indicator. High sell ratios historically correlate market tops:
code: library(ggplot2)  open_market <- trans[   trans_code %in% c("P", "S") & trans_date >= "2025-01-01" & trans_date <= "2025-12-31" ] open_market[, let(month = as.Date(format(trans_date, "%Y-%m-01")))] ratio <- open_market[,   .(n_buys = sum(trans_code == "P"), n_sells = sum(trans_code == "S")),   by = month ] ratio[, let(sell_buy_ratio = n_sells / n_buys)]  ggplot(ratio, aes(x = month, y = sell_buy_ratio)) +   geom_col() +   scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y") +   theme_minimal() +   theme(     plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),     panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.2),     panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),     panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),     axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),     axis.title = element_blank()   ) +   labs(title = "Insider sell/buy ratio by transaction count (2025)")

title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions
code: daily <- buys[, .(n_purchases = .N, total_usd = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE)), by = trans_date]  ggplot(daily, aes(x = trans_date, y = n_purchases)) +   geom_col() +   scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %d") +   theme_minimal() +   theme(     plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),     panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.2),     panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),     panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),     axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),     axis.title = element_blank()   ) +   labs(title = "Daily insider purchases by officers and directors (2025)")

title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions

title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions
text: Parse Form 4 XML see actual transactions — traded, many shares, price:
code: form4s <- filings[form == "4"] txns <- rbindlist(lapply(seq_len(min(10L, nrow(form4s))), function(i) {   edgar_form4(cik, form4s$accessionnumber[i], form4s$primarydocument[i]) })) txns[, .(owner_name, transaction_date, transaction_code, security_title, shares, price_per_share)] #>           owner_name transaction_date transaction_code security_title shares #>               <char>           <Date>           <char>         <char>  <num> #> 1: LEVINSON ARTHUR D       2026-02-26                G   Common Stock   1113 #> 2:      WAGNER SUSAN       2026-02-01                M   Common Stock   1255 #> 3:    SUGAR RONALD D       2026-02-01                M   Common Stock   1255 #> 4:   LOZANO MONICA C       2026-02-01                M   Common Stock   1255 #>    price_per_share #>              <num> #> 1:               0 #> 2:              NA #> 3:              NA #> 4:              NA

title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions
text: insiderTrades finreportr edgarWebR finstr tidyedgar XBRL

title: Manage the insidertrade cache — cache
text: sec_cache_dir() returns path cached data stored. sec_cache_clear() deletes cached files, including bulk data ZIPs API responses.

title: Manage the insidertrade cache — cache
text: Bulk data ZIPs sec_form345() always cached disk. API responses sec_tickers() edgar_submissions() cached enabled options(insidertrade.cache = TRUE). Cached API responses stored 7 days default, can customized options(insidertrade.cache_max_age = days).

title: Manage the insidertrade cache — cache
code: # view cache location sec_cache_dir() #> [1] "/home/runner/.cache/R/insidertrade"  if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # enable API caching options(insidertrade.cache = TRUE)  # clear all cached data sec_cache_clear() } # }

title: Parse a Form 4 filing — edgar_form4
text: Fetch parse XML single SEC Form 4 filing EDGAR, returning non-derivative transactions data.table::data.table().

title: Parse a Form 4 filing — edgar_form4
text: https://www.sec.gov/search-filings/edgar-application-programming-interfaces

title: Parse a Form 4 filing — edgar_form4
text: cik (integer(1) | character(1)) SEC Central Index Key filing entity. accession_number (character(1)) accession number filing (e.g. "0001234567-24-012345"). primary_document (character(1)) primary document filename filing (e.g. "xslF345X05/wf-form4.xml").

title: Parse a Form 4 filing — edgar_form4
text: data.table::data.table() one row per non-derivative transaction, containing columns: issuer_cik CIK issuing company. issuer_name Name issuing company. issuer_ticker Trading symbol issuing company. owner_cik CIK reporting owner. owner_name Name reporting owner. is_director Whether owner director. is_officer Whether owner officer. is_ten_percent_owner Whether owner 10% owner. is_other Whether owner another relationship. officer_title Title officer, applicable. security_title Title security transacted. transaction_date Date transaction. transaction_code Transaction code (e.g. "P" purchase, "S" sale). shares Number shares transacted. price_per_share Price per share. acquired_disposed "" acquired, "D" disposed. shares_owned_following Shares owned transaction. direct_or_indirect "D" direct, "" indirect ownership.

title: Parse a Form 4 filing — edgar_form4
code: # \donttest{ # first get insider filings for Apple Inc. filings <- edgar_insider_filings(320193) form4s <- filings[form == "4"]  # then parse a single Form 4 filing txn <- edgar_form4(   cik = 320193,   accession_number = form4s$accessionnumber[1L],   primary_document = form4s$primarydocument[1L] ) # }

title: EDGAR insider filings — edgar_insider_filings

title: EDGAR insider filings — edgar_insider_filings
code: # \donttest{ # Apple Inc. insider filings insider <- edgar_insider_filings(320193) # }

title: EDGAR company submissions — edgar_submissions

what: insidertrade: SEC Insider Trading Transactions — insidertrade-package
title: insidertrade: SEC Insider Trading Transactions — insidertrade-package
text: Download parse SEC insider trading data (Forms 3/4/5) quarterly bulk data sets EDGAR submissions API.

title: insidertrade: SEC Insider Trading Transactions — insidertrade-package
text: following options configure package behavior: insidertrade.user_agent: Required. string contact information (e.g. "@email.com"). SEC requires valid User-Agent API requests. insidertrade.cache: TRUE, cache API responses disk. Default FALSE. insidertrade.cache_max_age: Number days keep cached API responses. Default 7.

title: insidertrade: SEC Insider Trading Transactions — insidertrade-package
text: Maintainer: Maximilian Mücke muecke.maximilian@gmail.com (ORCID)

title: SEC Form 3/4/5 bulk data — sec_form345
text: Download parse quarterly bulk ZIP files SEC's insider transactions data sets.

title: SEC Form 3/4/5 bulk data — sec_form345
text: https://www.sec.gov/data-research/sec-markets-data/insider-transactions-data-sets

title: SEC Form 3/4/5 bulk data — sec_form345
text: year (integer()) year(s) filing (e.g. 2024 2023:2024). quarter (integer()) fiscal quarter(s). Must 1 4. Default 1:4. table (NULL | character()) Table names return. Valid names "deriv_holding", "deriv_trans", "footnotes", "nonderiv_holding", "nonderiv_trans", "owner_signature", "reportingowner", "submission". Default NULL. NULL, tables returned.

title: SEC Form 3/4/5 bulk data — sec_form345
text: named list data.table::data.table()s, one per table. multiple year/quarter combinations requested, tables row-bound across quarters. table length 1, single data.table::data.table() returned.

title: SEC Form 3/4/5 bulk data — sec_form345
code: # \donttest{ # Get all tables for Q2 2024 data <- sec_form345(2024, 2) names(data) #> [1] "deriv_holding"    "deriv_trans"      "footnotes"        "nonderiv_holding" #> [5] "nonderiv_trans"   "owner_signature"  "reportingowner"   "submission"        # Get only the submission table sub <- sec_form345(2024, 2, "submission")  # Get a full year of transactions trans <- sec_form345(2024, table = "nonderiv_trans") # }

code: # \donttest{ tickers <- sec_tickers() tickers[ticker == "AAPL"] #>       cik ticker      title #>     <int> <char>     <char> #> 1: 320193   AAPL Apple Inc. # }

title: SEC transaction codes — sec_transaction_codes
text: Returns lookup table mapping SEC transaction codes human-readable descriptions.

title: SEC transaction codes — sec_transaction_codes
text: https://www.sec.gov/edgar/searchedgar/ownershipformcodes.html

title: SEC transaction codes — sec_transaction_codes
text: data.table::data.table() columns code description.

title: SEC transaction codes — sec_transaction_codes
code: sec_transaction_codes() #> Error in rowwiseDT(code, description, "A", "Grant, award, or other acquisition pursuant to Rule 16b-3(d)",     "C", "Conversion of derivative security", "D", "Disposition to the issuer of issuer equity securities pursuant to Rule 16b-3(e)",     "E", "Expiration of short derivative position", "F", "Expiration (or cancellation) of long derivative position with value received",     "G", "Payment of exercise price or tax liability by delivering or withholding securities",     "H", "Bona fide gift", "I", "Discretionary transaction in accordance with Rule 16b-3(f)",     "J", "Other acquisition or disposition", "K", "Transaction in equity swap or instrument with similar characteristics",     "L", "Small acquisition under Rule 16a-6", "M", "Exercise or conversion of derivative security exempted pursuant to Rule 16b-3",     "O", "Exercise of out-of-the-money derivative security",     "P", "Open market or private purchase", "S", "Open market or private sale",     "U", "Disposition pursuant to a tender of shares in a change of control transaction",     "V", "Transaction voluntarily reported earlier than required",     "W", "Acquisition or disposition by will or the laws of descent and distribution",     "X", "Exercise of in-the-money or at-the-money derivative security",     "Z", "Deposit into or withdrawal from voting trust"): Must provide at least one column (use `name=`). See ?rowwiseDT for details

title: SEC insider transactions — sec_transactions
text: Download quarterly Form 3/4/5 data join nonderiv_trans table submission reportingowner tables accession_number.

title: SEC insider transactions — sec_transactions
text: https://www.sec.gov/data-research/sec-markets-data/insider-transactions-data-sets

title: SEC insider transactions — sec_transactions
text: year (integer()) year(s) filing (e.g. 2024 2023:2024). quarter (integer()) fiscal quarter(s). Must 1 4. Default 1:4.

title: SEC insider transactions — sec_transactions
text: data.table::data.table() transaction data joined submission reporting owner information.

title: insidertrade (development version)
text: edgar_form4() fetches parses Form 4 XML filing EDGAR, returning non-derivative transactions data.table. edgar_insider_filings() filters EDGAR submissions Forms 3, 4, 5. edgar_submissions() fetches company filing metadata EDGAR API. sec_tickers() fetches full CIK--ticker mapping SEC. sec_cache_clear() deletes cached ZIP files. sec_cache_dir() returns cache directory path. sec_form345() downloads parses quarterly SEC Form 3/4/5 bulk data. sec_transaction_codes() returns lookup table SEC transaction codes descriptions. sec_transactions() returns insider transactions joined submission owner details.
